title: SEEDing – Nurturing the Ecological Self
summary: A training in ecocentric, nature-based youth work. We are going to expand our Ecological Self through the exploration of three fundamental concepts and nature-based educational approaches: Ecocentric Development, Deep Ecology and Outdoor Education.

title: Trash to treasure: introducing circular economy and green jobs in youth work
summary: The Trash to Treasure consortium would like to offer you the opportunity to interact and exchange with organisations and companies whose mission is to promote the circular economy and encourage green jobs and green careers among young people
participants_from: Erasmus+ Youth Programme countries, Other countries in the world, Partner Countries Neighbouring the EU

title: "INGAME" – Training Course
summary: INGAME is an international training course on gamification in non-formal education, bringing together youth workers to develop facilitation skills, create educational games, and promote interactive learning.
participants_from: Estonia, Finland, Germany, Latvia, Lithuania, Poland, Portugal

title: Problem Solving and Digital Tools  in Digital Projects
summary: This training course provides a comprehensive overview of the digital tools and technologies essential for modern project management. The course will be held only on Thursdays.
participants_from: Erasmus+ Youth Programme countries, Other countries in the world, Partner Countries Neighbouring the EU

title: TOP: Trainers' workshop on preparedness
summary: This is not a course about ticking the “preparedness” box. This is a space to ask uncomfortable questions, challenge assumptions, and think about what it means to be ready and prepared.
participants_from: Eastern Partnership countries, Erasmus+ Youth Programme countries, Southern Mediterranean countries, Western Balkan countries

title: Training course "Dive into youth participation in Sports sector"
summary: Are you involved in a grassroots sports organisation with a youth department, or in a sports club working with junior athletes? Would you like to give young members a stronger voice and role in your club’s activities and development?
participants_from: Erasmus+ Youth Programme countries, Western Balkan countries

title: Erasmu4Democracy ProjectLab
summary: Are you working to improve municipal youth participation and local democracy? Do you want to find other municipal partners to design Erasmus+ projects for developing youth participation in municipal decisions?
participants_from: Armenia, Morocco, Tunisia, Ukraine, Erasmus+ Youth Programme countries

title: RESPROUT OUR ROOTS : More-than-human and Imagination
summary: This TC will be a laboratory where we will examine our relationship with what is often called “nature” and explore the possibility of resprouting our roots thanks to imagination, reflection, non-formal tools, research on rituals, and artistic practices.

title: International Solidarity Project Meet-Up 2026
summary: The “International Solidarity Project Meet-Up” is an international meeting for national Solidarity Projects and their team members. It will bring together young people who are implementing or have implemented a Solidarity Project.
participants_from: Austria, Belgium - DE, Belgium - FL, Belgium - FR, Bulgaria, Croatia, Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Iceland, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Liechtenstein, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Republic of North Macedonia, Romania, Slovak Republic, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, Türkiye

title: Media Education Academy
summary: Media Education Academy is an Erasmus+ project helping educators develop media literacy, critical thinking, and digital safety skills through practical, game-based methods to navigate misinformation and online challenges.
participants_from: Austria, Belgium - DE, Belgium - FL, Belgium - FR, Bulgaria, Croatia, Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Iceland, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Liechtenstein, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Moldova, Netherlands, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Republic of North Macedonia, Romania, Serbia, Slovak Republic, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, Ukraine, Western Balkan countries

title: Creating something that doesn't yet exist it has to be the ambition of all who are alive - 28° National Week of the Method of Liberation and Conscientization by Paulo Freire
summary: A week with the method of the Brazilian pedagogist Paulo Freire, according to the reworking and adaptation carried out by Gino Piccio
participants_from: Erasmus+ Youth Programme countries, Other countries in the world, Partner Countries Neighbouring the EU

title: The Power of Non Formal Education in French / Le Pouvoir de l'éducation non formelle
summary: Training in French. Improving impact of Non Formal Education (NFE). Améliorer l'impact, les principes et les méthodes de l'ENF pour inviter les jeunes à être acteurs de changements sociaux. Repenser nos pratiques, en français.

title: The Playbook for Inclusion: Socio-Sports Leadership
summary: Focus on suppot young sport educator who want to use sport as a tool of inclusion. To promote diversity in sports and increase awareness of gender equality. Aimed for youth NGO that work with non-formal education for youth empowerment.
participants_from: Algeria, Armenia, Austria, Azerbaijan, Belgium - DE, Belgium - FL, Belgium - FR, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Bulgaria, Croatia, Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Egypt, Estonia, Finland, France, Georgia, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Italy, Jordan, Latvia, Liechtenstein, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Morocco, Netherlands, Norway, Palestine, Poland, Portugal, Republic of North Macedonia, Romania, Serbia, Slovak Republic, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, Tunisia, Türkiye, Ukraine

title: Belarus in Erasmus+ & European Solidarity Corps: Consultations for Belarusian Youth and Potential Partners
summary:
Are you a young person from Belarus interested in Erasmus+ or the ESC volunteering? 

Or an organization interested in working with Belarus but unsure how to navigate the current context?

Get a consultation with clear guidance and support.
participants_from: Eastern Partnership countries, Erasmus+ Youth Programme countries

title: PBA Make the Move for Green Inclusion V
summary: PBA is organised to find good reliable partners for youth exchanges with a focus on inclusion and "green" and to understand the needs for a YE of good quality. For this time, youth workers and young people from same structures will come together.

title: Youth+: How to help youth with fewer/less opportunities grow in volunteering projects
summary:
An online course for youth workers to learn: 
- how to approach a group of youth with fewer opportunities,
- how to involve them, to create their own volunteering project to help a community in need,
- how to train, coach, mentor and support them.
participants_from: Erasmus+ Youth Programme countries, Other countries in the world, Partner Countries Neighbouring the EU
